title: Multi-Decadal Remote Sensing of Crop Planting Structure and Surface Water Dynamics in the Ningxia Plain: Drivers and Scale-Dependent Responses
description: SpeakForWater Episode 28: Multi-Decadal Remote Sensing of Crop Planting Structure and Surface Water Dynamics in the Ningxia Plain: Drivers and Scale-Dependent Responses. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
